name: linuxbrew
title: Linuxbrew
description: Search, inspect, install, upgrade, and clean Linuxbrew packages from Vicinae.
author: domainus

commands.name: installed
commands.title: Show Installed
commands.subtitle: Linuxbrew
commands.description: List installed Linuxbrew formulae and casks

commands.name: clean-up
commands.title: Clean up
commands.subtitle: Linuxbrew
commands.description: Clean old files and packages from the Linuxbrew cache

preferences.name: customBrewPath
preferences.title: Custom Brew Executable Path
preferences.description: Defaults to /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew when present, then brew on PATH

preferences.name: includeCasks
preferences.title: Search
preferences.label: Include casks when searching
preferences.description: Include Homebrew casks alongside formulae in search results.

preferences.name: greedyUpgrades
preferences.title: Upgrades
preferences.label: Include auto-updating casks when checking or upgrading
preferences.description: Pass --greedy to Homebrew outdated and upgrade commands.

preferences.name: cleanupAll
preferences.title: Clean up
preferences.label: Include --prune=all when cleaning
preferences.description: Remove all cached downloads instead of respecting Homebrew's default cleanup threshold.
